name: Hershey's 1,001 Cocoa Bundt Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup plus 1 tablespoon unsalted butter, divided
1 cup plus 1 tablespoon cocoa powder, divided
1 cup strong coffee (or 2 teaspoons instant dissolved in 1 cup boiling water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Position oven rack in the center of the oven.
2. Brush a 12-cup nonstick Bundt pan lightly with 1 tablespoon butter and dust the pan generously with 1 tablespoon cocoa, tapping out excess.
3. In a large mixing bowl, sift together dry ingredients.
4. Melt 1 stick (8 tablespoons) of unsalted butter and let it cool slightly.
5. Add the melted butter to the dry mixture along with buttermilk, strong coffee or instant coffee dissolved in boiling water, and vanilla extract. Mix at medium speed for 2 minutes until a smooth batter forms.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared Bundt pan.
7. Bake for 45-55 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean but still slightly moist when tested. Do not overbake.
